title: An Act to Amend Certain Definitions in the Laws Governing Conservation Easements
last_house_action: 3/26/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/30/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on March 12, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.

Representative ROBERTS from the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE Reporting that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED and the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY in concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-883) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-883) READ and ADOPTED , in concurrence. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (H-883), in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

amendments.label: C "A" (H-883 )
amendments.new_title: An Act to Amend Certain Definitions in the Laws Governing Conservation Easements
